name: Wing-Ding
recipeIngredient: 36 Chicken wings, tips removed (and saved for stock!)
3/4 cup Green bell pepper, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the sauce by combining all ingredients except the wings and peanut oil.
2. Allow to marinade about 1 hour in the fridge.
3. Split the chicken wings into sections.
4. Coat in seasoned flour.
5. Fry in peanut oil until done.
6. Serve with the sauce on the side.
